LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.description: This is a false bridge support that won't hold any bridge above it.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeBridge.label: fake bridge
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.description: This is not made of snow, but a very fake looking polyurethane foam.
LanguageData.VFEPD_FakeSnowman.label: fake snowman
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.description: This is just a shallow hole with a tiny device spewing tepid, misted water. Provides no heat or energy, but looks cool.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Geyser.label: fake steam geyser
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.description: This doesn't even glow! I want to speak with the manager!
LanguageData.VFEPD_GlowPod.label: fake glow pod
LanguageData.VFEPD_Hive.label: fake hive
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.description: A festive present. Actually just a painted cardboard box. Booooh.
LanguageData.VFEPD_Present.label: present
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.description: A decorative space hive. Won't produce any insects.
LanguageData.VFEPD_SpaceHive.label: space hive
